name: youtube-channel-data-viewer
description: Charge les vidéos d'une chaîne YouTube, pilote une collecte pré-roll via extension Chrome et exporte vidéos, observations et synthèses vers Excel.

scripts.check: node --check api/resolve-channel.js && node --check api/channel-videos.js && node --check api/videos.js && node --check api/health.js && node --check lib/youtube.js && node --check lib/http.js && node --check public/assets/js/search.js && node --check public/assets/js/app.js && node --check extension/shared.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/service-worker.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node tests/channel-reference-tests.js && node tests/api-route-tests.js && node tests/search-tests.js && node tests/load-criteria-tests.js && node tests/export-columns-tests.js && node tests/ad-observations-tests.js && node tests/advertiser-export-tests.js && node tests/collector-extension-tests.js && node tests/collector-integration-tests.js
scripts.test: node tests/channel-reference-tests.js && node tests/api-route-tests.js && node tests/search-tests.js && node tests/load-criteria-tests.js && node tests/export-columns-tests.js && node tests/ad-observations-tests.js && node tests/advertiser-export-tests.js && node tests/collector-extension-tests.js && node tests/collector-integration-tests.js
